style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=light-dark(#FFFFFF,#FFBF00);gradientColor=light-dark(#000000,#FF8000);strokeColor=light-dark(#000000,#990000);strokeWidth=3;" value="<h1 data-start="2505" data-end="2533"><font style="font-size: 14px;"><u>API Key Security Limitations</u></font></h1><p data-start="2563" data-end="2572"><u><b>API keys:</b></u></p><ul><li data-start="2563" data-end="2572"><div align="left">identifies applications only</div></li><li data-start="2563" data-end="2572"><div align="left">does not authenticate users</div></li><li data-start="2563" data-end="2572"><div align="left">limited IAM integration</div></li><li data-start="2563" data-end="2572"><div align="left">weaker authorization controls</div></li></ul><div><br></div><p data-start="2660" data-end="2685"><u>Recommended Google Cloud Security Models</u></p><p data-start="2660" data-end="2685" align="left"><u>• OAuth 2.0<br>• IAM<br>• Service Accounts<br></u><u>• Workload Identity</u></p>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="280" width="289" x="389" y="107" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="wv-Q4G2cOIZFpkdd0oIp-12" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;fillColor=light-dark(#FFFFFF,#666666);" value="<div><div align="center"><u><b></b></u><b><span style="white-space: pre;">	</span><span style="white-space: pre;">	</span><span style="white-space: pre;">	</span></b><u><b>ACE Recognition Pattern</b></u><br></div><br>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; Human user authenticating:<br>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;→ OAuth 2.0<br><br>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; Application accessing resources:<br>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;→ Service Account</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="131" width="288" x="389" y="399" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="wv-Q4G2cOIZFpkdd0oIp-13" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=light-dark(#FFFFFF,#0000CC);" value="<b><font style="font-size: 15px;">Mobile App</font></b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="215" x="145" y="127" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="wv-Q4G2cOIZFpkdd0oIp-14" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=light-dark(#FFFFFF,#7F00FF);" value="<font style="font-size: 15px;"><b>OAuth 2.0 User Token</b></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="215" x="143" y="206" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="wv-Q4G2cOIZFpkdd0oIp-15" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;gradientColor=light-dark(#000000,#00CC00);" ACE Recognition Pattern

→ OAuth 2.0
Application accessing resources:
→ Service Account
